## Description {#description}

Displays the symbolized jemalloc heap profile. Run 'SYSTEM JEMALLOC FLUSH PROFILE' to generate a profile first.

## Columns {#columns}

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
- `line` ([String](/sql-reference/data-types/string)) — Line from the symbolized jemalloc heap profile.
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->
